title: Performance Marketing Specialist (Media Buyer)
description:
REQUIREMENTS

  • Diploma or Degree in any discipline (Marketing / Business preferred).
  • Minimum 2 years’ hands-on experience in Performance Marketing / Media Buying (agency experience is a plus).
  • Strong working knowledge of paid media on Google Ads and Meta (Facebook/Instagram); comfortable with LinkedIn Ads. Bonus if you’ve run TikTok, 小红书 (XHS) and/or Lemon8 campaigns.
  • Solid analytical thinking and strong written communication (you can explain performance clearly, not just show numbers).
  • Competent with tracking and measurement tools (e.g., GA4, Tag Manager, pixels/conversion APIs, platform reporting, Looker Studio or similar).

RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Understand the client’s business, offer, margins, target audiences and sales process; translate that into a clear campaign plan and testing roadmap.
  • Plan, build and manage campaigns across Google, Meta, LinkedIn and other relevant channels (TikTok/XHS/Lemon8 where suitable).
  • Set up account structures, audiences, keywords, creatives, placements, budgets and bidding strategies; maintain strong hygiene (naming conventions, tracking, exclusions, negatives, etc.).
  • Write and iterate ad copy (or brief writers/designers with clear direction), and run disciplined A/B testing across hooks, angles, offers, formats and landing pages.
  • Optimise campaigns daily/weekly: reduce wastage, improve CTR/CVR, lower CPA, and scale what works without breaking efficiency.
  • Perform keyword and audience research, and continuously expand reach through new angles, campaign types and targeting approaches.
  • Run competitive intelligence: monitor competitor positioning, creatives, offers and funnel tactics to spot opportunities and gaps.
  • Ensure tracking is reliable: validate conversions, events, attribution setup, UTM discipline and reporting consistency.
  • Deliver accurate monthly performance reports with clear insights, actions taken, next experiments, and what’s needed from the client to unlock better results.
  • Document your workflow and build SOPs with management so campaigns become easier to scale, handover and improve across the team.

postedCompany.description:
ABOUT MEDIAONE


MediaOne is Singapore's top digital marketing agency. We are recognised for our professionalism, being the best in our field and our dedication to our customers. A highly established and recognised Industry Leader, we have served more than 2000 companies over the last 10 years.


Our clients include P&G, Capitaland, WWF, SingTel, ST Electronics, SportsHub, Ministry of Law, Enterprise Singapore, National Gallery, NTUC Learning Hub, Edelman, Phillip Securities, Maybank, Canon, SingHealth, Marigold, Dairy Farm Group, China Telecoms, and many more.


In a competitive digital marketplace, we thrive and excel because of our ISO Certified service standards.


As the result of our continuous search for excellence, we have achieved various accolades including BizSafe certification, The Most Promising SME 500 Awards, Best SEO Awards, Google Partner status, and were featured in The Sunday Times, ChannelNewsAsia, MoneyFM, Yahoo! Finance and even overseas press.


Employee welfare, happiness, and constant upgrading are part of our DNA. We have one of the highest Glassdoor ratings for any agency operating in Singapore.


There is no better career at this time than digital marketing; it is one of the fastest most exciting and dynamic industries sought after by all businesses that recognise that it either be seen online or be irrelevant tomorrow.


As a digital marketing consultant with MediaOne, you get to work on many different campaigns and learn their particular challenges which makes it both interesting and great for experience.


Where else at a relatively junior level, can you know enough to be respected and sought after by senior-level executives in large MNCs and billion-dollar enterprises.


MediaOne is widely known for its strong learning, mentoring, and dare-to-try culture that has cultivated many digital specialists' careers - some of whom are holding senior positions in the industry; we make sure you learn and you succeed!


Our warm nurturing, no-levels, and flexible culture mean you spend less time worrying about corporate red tape and spend more time making friends, cultivating valuable connections, learning, growing, and basically enjoying your working life whilst earning.
postedCompany.name: MEDIAONE BUSINESS GROUP PTE. LTD.
